name: domain-quantum-companies
description: Use web_search to search for 'quantum computing companies Google IBM Microsoft qubit count milestones 2025'. Same quantum articles will appear. Compare the 3 leading quantum computing companies and their latest milestone. One sentence each. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: Google's 105-qubit Willow chip achieved the first below-threshold quantum error correction demonstration and completed a random circuit sampling benchmark in 5 minutes that would take classical supercomputers 10^25 years. IBM deployed its 156-qubit Heron processor in System Two and plans to link three 1,386-qubit Kookaburra chips into a 4,158-qubit system in 2026, with a fault-tolerant 200-logical-qubit Starling system targeted for 2029. Microsoft introduced the Majorana 1 topological qubit chip using novel topoconductor materials and, with Atom Computing, demonstrated 24 entangled logical qubits -- the highest count on record.
key_facts: Google's Willow chip has 105 superconducting qubits and demonstrated below-threshold error correction published in Nature
IBM's current Heron processor offers 133 or 156 qubits, with a 4,158-qubit Kookaburra system planned for 2026
Microsoft introduced Majorana 1 topological qubit architecture and demonstrated 24 entangled logical qubits with Atom Computing
IBM's Starling system targets 200 logical qubits executing 100 million gates by 2029
Quantinuum reached quantum volume over 2 million with its 56-qubit system
